publication.changeSummary: Misconception MCQ, canonical fill-gap, and no code task for Automated tests; every item remains blocked from formal exams pending independent human review.

items.title: Automated tests: reject the misconception

feedback.correct: Correct. Assert public behavior with deterministic fixtures, isolate true external boundaries, and derive cases from equivalence classes, boundaries, and failures.
feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Assert public behavior with deterministic fixtures, isolate true external boundaries, and derive cases from equivalence classes, boundaries, and failures.

items.title: Automated tests: canonical checkpoint

feedback.correct: Correct. The checkpoint is 'public behavior'. Assert public behavior with deterministic fixtures, isolate true external boundaries, and derive cases from equivalence classes, boundaries, and failures.
